---
id: list-subnames
title: "List subnames"
description: "Returns all subnames under the resolved namespace. Namespace selection can come from an API key binding, a namespace query parameter, or the `x-enscribe-namespace` header."
sidebar_label: "List subnames"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//enscribe-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List subnames"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v2/orgs/{orgId}/subnames"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all subnames under the resolved namespace. Namespace selection can come from an API key binding, a namespace query parameter, or the `x-enscribe-namespace` header.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
